case_title: DIMABAYAO, RAUL L. VS DWYER, SUN

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO PLAINTIFF DIMABAYAO, RAUL L.
WRIT OF EXECUTION WAS RETURNED BACK TO THE SHERIFF DEPT. PER MIMI, IT WAS RETURNED TO US IN ERROR.
COPIES OF ORDER SENT TO ALL PARTIES AND THE SHERIFF DEPT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF DIMABAYAO, RAUL L.
PROOF OF SERVICE ON NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION MAILED TO RAUL DIMABAYAO.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF SEP-24-2007, GRANTED AS TO PLAINTIFF DIMABAYAO, RAUL L.
THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGEMENT DEBTOR.
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED ON OCT. 22, 2007.
DUPLICATE POS FILED ON DEFT'S CLAIM AS TO: DIMABAYAO, RAUL L. FILED.
DEFT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED.
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO PLAINTIFF DIMABAYAO, RAUL L. HEARING SET FOR SEP-24-2007 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,320.00 FILED BY DIMABAYAO, RAUL L. AS TO DEFENDANT DWYER, SUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,300.00 FILED BY DWYER, SUN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DIMABAYAO, RAUL L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIMABAYAO, RAUL L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DWYER, SUN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DWYER, SUN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT DIMABAYAO, RAUL L. $270.48 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $375.48 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
